data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the exploratory step.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario where a user views corporate vs local reporting split. However, there is no evidence provided that demonstrates the functionality or endpoints related to this specific reporting feature. The linked use case outlines various needs but does not include any concrete evidence or tests that confirm the implementation of the reporting split functionality, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of functionality related to viewing corporate vs local reporting split.
